title: More Nonsense Limerick 6
content:
There was an old man in a barge,
    Whose nose was exceedingly large;
    But in fishing by night, 
    It supported a light,
    Which helped that old man in a barge.
meaning:
"More Nonsense Limerick 6" is a quintessential example of Edward Lear's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
